corrections.current: 88 εὐλογεῖτε, Ἀνανία, Ἀζαρία, Μισαήλ, τὸν κύριον·
corrections.correct: 88 εὐλογεῖτε, Ἀνανία, Ἀζαρία, Μεισαήλ, τὸν κύριον·
corrections.note: Printed name is Μεισαήλ, not Μισαήλ.
Lemma in apparatus also reads Μεισαηλ.
Apparatus is printed without accent here; transcript introduced accented/eta form inconsistent with image.

notes: Body verse order 76, 78, 77, 79 etc. matches the page as printed. Final standalone page number 523 is present and correctly transcribed.
